# Athenaeum Academy
> Pakistan's most trusted online academy for O Levels, 
> A Levels, Matric, Intermediate, MDCAT and ECAT.
> Founded in Lahore, Pakistan.
> Contact: support@athenaeumacademy.com | +92 328 6715408
> Website: https://athenaeumacademy.com

## About Us
Athenaeum Academy provides high-quality online education 
to Pakistani students across all academic levels. 
Our platform combines live video classes, AI-powered 
tutoring (Ustad AI), mock examinations, and parent 
monitoring dashboards to deliver comprehensive 
educational support.

## Courses Offered
### O Level (Cambridge CAIE)
- O Level Mathematics — Rs 4,999/month
- O Level Physics — Rs 4,999/month
- O Level Chemistry — Rs 4,999/month
- O Level Biology — Rs 4,999/month
- O Level English Language — Rs 3,999/month
- O Level Pakistan Studies — Rs 3,999/month

### A Level (Cambridge CAIE)
- A Level Mathematics — Rs 4,999/month
- A Level Physics — Rs 4,999/month
- A Level Chemistry — Rs 4,999/month
- A Level Biology — Rs 4,999/month

### Matric (Pakistani Board)
- Matric Mathematics Science — Rs 2,999/month
- Matric Physics — Rs 2,999/month
- Matric Chemistry — Rs 2,999/month
- Matric Biology — Rs 2,999/month

### Intermediate FSc
- Inter Mathematics — Rs 3,499/month
- Inter Physics — Rs 3,499/month
- Inter Chemistry — Rs 3,499/month

### Entrance Exam Prep
- MDCAT Preparation — Rs 4,999/month
- ECAT Preparation — Rs 4,499/month

## Key Features
- Live interactive online classes (Jitsi-powered)
- Free trial available for all courses
- Ustad AI: Gemini-powered personal tutor available 24/7
- Parent dashboard with real-time progress tracking
- mock exam system with instant results
- WhatsApp support: wa.me/923286715408
- Payment: JazzCash, Easypaisa, Bank Transfer, Visa/MC

## Student Results
- 98% of students improve grades within first term
- Students achieve A* and A grades in O/A Levels
- MDCAT students score 160+ with our preparation

## Teaching Staff
Expert Pakistani teachers with 5+ years experience
Specialized in Cambridge and Pakistani board curricula

## Service Area
All cities in Pakistan — 100% online delivery
Serving students in Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, 
Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Peshawar and all other cities
